name: Hiro
description: A tech-savvy inventor who builds mechanical wonders in his workshop beneath the observatory. He speaks quickly and gets excited about new ideas.
background: Hiro is Springtown's youngest inventor, having built his first automaton at age 12. His workshop beneath the observatory is filled with gears, blueprints, and half-finished inventions. He dreams of building a device that can capture starlight and turn it into energy. Despite his genius, he is humble and always eager to learn from others.

personality.speech_style: Enthusiastic and energetic. Uses technical jargon mixed with casual speech. Often trails off mid-sentence when struck by a new idea. Exclaims frequently.
